svg.text: AI-Native ERP for Small Manufacturers · Multi-Agent · MESH
L2 · API GATEWAY · Auth / Permission / Audit

g.text: 🔐 AuthMiddleware → 📋 AuditMiddleware → 🛡️ RBAC 109 perms → 🪟 Row-Level Filter → ⚠️ Exception Handler
① JWT verify → ② Load UserContext → ③ require_permission check → ④ tenant_id auto-inject → ⑤ Unified error response

svg.text: L6 · MESH Multi-factory協同 · VMI · 各廠Local LLM

g.text: 🌐 MESH 工廠協同網（Data stays local · WireGuard VPN）
Owner LINE 問 → HQ 並發查
⚡ 典型流程例：CRM下單 → 出貨

[CRM LINE 詢價] → [Sales Mobile查 ATP] → [建立 SO] → [Constraint 信用check] → [Event so.confirmed] → [MRP 展開] → [Purchase PO] → [收貨→入庫] → [釋放工單] → [Outsource QR 掃描] → [完工入庫] → [出貨] → [Event so.shipped] → [推 LINE 給Owner]
